title: Umbaran Shadow Assassin
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Umbaran_Shadow_Assassin_TOR.jpg|thumb|right|300px|An Umbaran Shadow Assassin during the [[Crisis on Umbara]].]]
'''Umbaran Shadow Assassins''' were [[Umbaran/Legends|Umbaran]] [[Soldier/Legends|warriors]] in existence at least since the time of the [[War against Zakuul|rebellion against the Eternal Empire]], taking part in some galactic events. They eventually became [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Sith spy|spies]] employed by the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] during the [[New Sith Wars]]. They trained in the [[Sith Academy (Umbara)|Umbaran Sith Academy]]. Their preferred weapon of choice was the [[Force pike/Legends|Force pike]]

Shadow Assassins were able to mask their presence, not just in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] but also from physical senses such as sight and sound.<ref name="POD">''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]''</ref> It was also hinted that they had the ability to kill using the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] with minimal effort. They were not as skilled at combat if their primary advantages, surprise and secrecy, were neutralized.<ref name="ROT">''[[Darth Bane: Rule of Two]]''</ref>

==History==
At least eight Umbaran Shadow Assassins survived the [[Thought bomb]] that killed virtually all the Sith at the [[Seventh Battle of Ruusan]]. They were recruited by a Sith-following [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] known as [[Hetton]] for his own personal use. However, they were all killed by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]] when Hetton [[Duel on Ambria (990 BBY)|attacked]] him, hoping to secure his apprenticeship to Bane's own apprentice, [[Darth Zannah/Legends|Darth Zannah]].<ref name="ROT" />
